chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. S – 363 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Application in disposed of case 1. For orders on MA No.6255/2025 (U/A) 2. For orders on MA No.6256/2025 (Ex./A) 3. For orders on MA No.6257/2025 (R/Surety) 06.11.2025 Mr. Sikandar Sadar Siddiqui, Advocate for applicant / surety..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- 1. Urgency is allowed. 2. Exemption is granted subject to all just legal exceptions. 3. This application has been filed by the applicant seeking return of surety document. As per contentions of learned Counsel, supported by report of Accountant of this Court, it appears that accused Ghulam Raza, Javed, Qalandar Bux, Abdullah and Rajib Hussain were granted interim pre-arrest bail by this Court vide order dated 31.05.2024, subject to their furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.50,000/- each, for which the applicant stood surety by depositing original solvency certificate No.10 dated 29.05.2024, issued by the Mukhtiarkar (Revenue), Taluka Moro. Thereafter, the bail application of accused was dismissed being infructuous by this Court vide order dated 28.10.2024 on account of conclusion of their main case, wherein they have been acquitted by the learned trial Court, as is evident from the judgment dated 30.09.2024, annexed with this application. Mr. Muhammad Raza Katohar, learned Deputy Prosecutor General, present in Court in connection with other matters, waives notice and does not oppose this application. Accordingly, the application is allowed. Office is directed to return the surety document to the applicant after proper identification and verification, as per rules.
Accordingly, the application is allowed. Office is directed to return the surety document to the applicant after proper identification and verification, as per rules. J U D G E Abdul Basit
